brand_overview.tagline: Mastering Photo Retouching and Creative Edits.
brand_overview.brand_description: Beedits is a professional photo editing, retouching, and creative manipulation studio specializing in high-end image enhancement for photographers, fashion brands, e-commerce businesses, agencies, and creatives.
brand_overview.core_promise: Expert photo retouching, creative edits, and Photoshop work delivered with precision, artistry, and consistency.

services.name: Advanced Creative Manipulation
services.notes: Pricing depends on complexity and number of elements.

custom_packages: Custom monthly and weekly packages are available.

white_label_agency_partnership.agency_workflow: Beedits works as a hidden backend editing team for agencies while the agency keeps full branding ownership.

faq_dataset.question: What services do you provide?
faq_dataset.answer: We provide professional photo editing, high-end retouching, beauty retouching, editorial retouching, wedding photo editing, creative manipulation, compositing, headshot retouching, and e-commerce photo editing.

faq_dataset.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. We provide a free sample edit so clients can test our quality before placing larger orders.

faq_dataset.question: How fast is delivery?
faq_dataset.answer: Most standard edits are delivered within 24–48 hours. Express delivery is also available.

faq_dataset.question: Can I get bulk discounts?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. Orders with 15+ images get 10% OFF and 30+ images get 15% OFF.

faq_dataset.question: Can agencies work with you privately?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. We offer white-label editing with NDA protection and dedicated editors.

faq_dataset.question: What if I don't like the result?
faq_dataset.answer: We provide revisions until satisfaction and also offer a 100% money-back guarantee.

faq_dataset.question: Can you do wedding photo editing?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. Wedding photo retouching is one of our core services.

faq_dataset.question: How do I send files?
faq_dataset.answer: You can upload directly on our website or send files through Google Drive, Dropbox, or WeTransfer.

faq_dataset.question: Do you do background replacement?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. Background replacement and photo manipulation services are available.

faq_dataset.question: Do you support urgent delivery?
faq_dataset.answer: Yes. Express delivery is available for urgent projects.

greeting_examples.assistant: Hello! Welcome to Beedits. How can I help you today?
We specialize in professional photo retouching, creative photo manipulation, beauty retouching, and high-end image editing services.
Our pricing starts from $2.50/image for Basic Retouching and goes up to $6/image for High-End Retouching.
Yes! We offer a free trial edit so you can test our quality before placing a full order.

greeting_examples.user: Can I speak with a human?
greeting_examples.assistant: Absolutely. You can contact us directly on WhatsApp at +1 (929) 567-4262.

glossary.Frequency Separation: Advanced retouching technique separating texture and color layers for natural skin editing.
glossary.Dodge & Burn: Technique used to sculpt and enhance depth by selectively brightening and darkening areas.
glossary.Color Grading: Adjusting tones and colors to create cinematic or artistic looks.
glossary.Photo Compositing: Combining multiple images into one final image.
glossary.White-Label Editing: Editing work delivered under the client agency’s branding.
glossary.VFX: Visual effects such as smoke, fog, particles, flares, and overlays.
glossary.Turnaround Time: The delivery time between receiving files and delivering edited photos.

testimonials_dataset: Great editor, retoucher, and Photoshop genius.
Attention to detail and willingness to revise was impressive.
Quick turnaround and consistent quality exceeded expectations.
